assertions.title: Timeline tracks headcount, departures, and reorgs

steps.action: Open Org Chart with isolated timeline scenario selected at current state
steps.expected: Current headcount summary matches current visible employees
steps.observed: Current state showed Alice TL + Carol TL and headcount pill Total=2

steps.expected: Reorg reflected and headcount updates to historical snapshot
steps.observed: Bob TL appears under Carol TL (reorg), and Total pill updates to 3

steps.expected: Departure reflected with employee disappearance and updated count
steps.observed: Bob TL disappears at delete state and Total pill shows 2
Showing: Current restored with Total=2 matching current chart

evidence.network: GET /api/scenarios/69e2857f43b9898471bc72df/history?date=2026-04-17T19:09:54.259445Z -> xhr observed; GET /api/scenarios/69e2857f43b9898471bc72df/history?date=2026-04-17T19:09:55.940388Z -> xhr observed; both endpoints returned HTTP 200 in direct API verification

assertions.title: Scenario diff shows structural and field-level changes

steps.action: Open Compare view and select prepared Scenario A and Scenario B (clone+edits)
steps.observed: CompareView loaded diff for analytics-rerun-g1-compare-a-* vs its (Copy) scenario
Diff Summary shows +2 added, 1 moved, 1 changed (removed=0)

steps.action: Inspect tree panels for change types
steps.expected: Trees show added, moved, and changed entries
steps.observed: Scenario B tree marks Dave/Eve as added, Bob as moved, and Carol as changed; Scenario A tree shows corresponding moved/changed tags

evidence.network: GET /api/scenarios/69e2858443b9898471bc7305/diff/69e2858543b9898471bc731c -> xhr observed in agent-browser (HTTP 200 via direct API verification)

frictions.description: Direct @ref click on timeline move-event marker was intermittently blocked by overlapping timeline elements.
frictions.resolution: Used in-session DOM click on the marker button (per guidance for flaky timeline marker targeting) and re-verified resulting UI states.

frictions.description: CompareView briefly remained in 'Loading comparison…' after scenario selection.
frictions.resolution: Waited for async diff completion before capturing final summary/tree evidence.

summary: Retested 2 previously failed assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-AV-003 now updates headcount correctly during timeline scrubbing; VAL-CROSS-015 now reports expected diff counts for the prepared A→B pair.
